app.name: AI Gateway
profile.title: AI Gateway
sidebar.label: Sidebar
status.ownKey: Connected on your own key — no limits
status.compareUnlimited: All Compare participants on your own keys — unlimited
status.comparePartial: Not all participants are on your own keys — limits apply
rag.empty: Upload a PDF or text file to ask questions about it.
rag.askPlaceholder: Ask a question about your uploaded documents.
chat.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation.
compare.empty: Run a comparison to see responses.
selector.title: AI Judge
errors.ownKeyRateLimited: Your own key’s limits are used up — check your account with that provider. This is separate from your app request limit.
errors.lengthExceeded: The model stopped at its length limit before producing an answer. Try a shorter prompt.
errors.emptyResponse: The model returned no answer. Please try again.
chatList.limitReached: Chat limit of {limit} reached. Delete a chat to create a new one.
chat.deleteConfirm: Delete this chat and its messages?
topbar.title: AI Gateway v1.0
topbar.subtitle: Multi-Model Response System
topbar.compareInfo: Your request is handled by AI models in parallel; the judge ({model}) picks the best answer.
compare.title: All Model Responses
compare.fail.lengthExceeded: Stopped at the length limit before answering.
compare.fail.ownKeyRateLimited: Your own key’s limits are used up — check your account with that provider.
banner.fallbackUsed: Responses were evaluated by fallback script.
banner.reason.judgeUnavailable: The judge was unavailable (timeout, rate limit, or network).
banner.reason.invalidResponse: The judge returned an invalid response.
banner.reason.lowConfidence: The judge's confidence was below the threshold.
composer.autoRagNote: While you have documents, every answer is grounded in them automatically.
rag.acceptHint: Text documents only: PDF, TXT, MD.
rag.persistWarn: Heads up: an uploaded file is stored on the server and used in your answers until you remove it. Deleting it (✕) is permanent and cannot be undone.
rag.err.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Allowed: PDF, TXT, MD.
rag.err.noText: No readable text found in the document.
single.note: Single chat is not saved separately. You can't create a saved chat here; you can clear the history — messages disappear from the screen.
single.switchConfirm: If you switch the model, your messages will disappear and cannot be restored.
compare.threadEmpty: Ask your first question to start this chat.
author.name: Stanislav Byndas
author.tagline: Full-Stack Developer — designed and built solo, end to end, with the help of AI.
limit.title: Limited account
limit.intro: This account uses the app’s built-in free API keys, so requests are limited.
keys.title: Your API keys (BYOK)
keys.intro: Use your own provider keys instead of the app's shared free keys. For each slot, choose the endpoint (Base URL), paste the API key and pick a model.
keys.noteSecurity: Keys are stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) on the server, scoped to your account — never in plaintext, never in logs. Sign in from another device and they're here; sign out and nothing stays in this browser.
keys.replaceMask: •••• {last4} — enter a new key to replace
keys.noteFree: A model on your own key is not counted against your account limit.
keys.notePartial: Compare is unlimited only when every participant (the judge + all responders) is on your own key; otherwise it counts as one request. In Single, any model on your own key is always free.
keys.noteJudgeSingle: If you set your own model for the Judge, it’s also available in Single — running on your key with no limits.
keys.modelsFound: {n} models — pick one from the list
keys.noModelsManual: Couldn't list models for this provider — enter the model id manually.
keys.models.badKey: The key didn't work for listing models — check the API key.
keys.incompleteBuiltin: Enter the API key and pick a model, or press Clear.
keys.incompleteCustom: Choose an endpoint, enter the API key and pick a model.
keys.info.apiKey: Your secret key from the provider's dashboard (e.g. OpenAI, OpenRouter → API Keys). It must belong to the same provider as the endpoint. Stored encrypted on the server, scoped to your account — never in plaintext.
keys.info.modelId: The provider's exact model id (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, deepseek-chat). Click “Load models” to pick from the provider's list; it must exist at the chosen provider.
keys.info.baseUrl: Leave the default to use this slot's built-in provider, or pick another OpenAI-compatible provider to override it. The API key and model id must belong to the chosen provider.
keys.keyFailed: This key didn't work — check the key, model id and endpoint.
keys.singleConnected: Your model {model} is connected — no limits.
keys.compareLimitedNotice: Available with limits: not all participants are on your own keys. Add keys for the judge and all responders for unlimited Compare.
keys.compareUnlimited: All Compare participants are on your own keys — unlimited.
admin.title: Admin panel
admin.deleteConfirm: Delete account "{username}"? This permanently removes the account and all its data — chats, history, usage and saved keys. This can't be undone.
reports.title: Reports
settings.title: Settings
settings.judge.title: Judge criteria
settings.judge.desc: Set what the AI judge should weigh when picking the best answer in Compare. The scoring scale and output format are fixed.
comingSoon.profile.title: Profile & Avatar
comingSoon.profile.desc: Editing your profile and uploading an avatar is coming soon.
comingSoon.security.title: Security
comingSoon.security.desc: Password changes and session management are coming soon.
usage.title: Usage
history.title: History
picker.title: Start a single-model chat
picker.subtitle: Choose which model should answer. The model is fixed for this chat.
picker.addDesc: Connect your own provider key in Settings to add a model.
picker.desc.groq: Fast inference — great for quick, low-latency answers.
picker.desc.cerebras: Efficient reasoning model with snappy replies.
picker.desc.sambanova: High-capacity model for longer, detailed responses.
picker.desc.judge: Your own judge model, available here as a responder.
single.modelLocked: The model is fixed for this chat. Start a new chat to use a different model.
single.threadEmpty: Ask your first question to start this chat.
reports.range.label: Period
reports.chart.title: Activity over time
reports.chart.aria: Activity over time: {requests} requests and {tokens} tokens across {buckets} buckets.
reports.state.error: Couldn't load the report. Try again.
reports.access.label: Access key
reports.breakdown.legend: Each row shows requests · tokens. Expand to drill down: access key → model → chats.
settings.judge.fixedHint: Only the criteria are editable — the role, rules and the 0–100 / JSON format are fixed by the system.
